ideas.coreStatement: Test a small neighborhood tool-sharing library with ten households to learn which tools people would share, while resolving responsibility for damaged or unreturned tools.

sourceSpans.quote: I keep thinking our neighborhood should have a small tool-sharing library so people do not each buy a drill or ladder they use twice a year. I want to test the idea with ten households on our block and learn which tools people would actually share. The blocker is figuring out who is responsible when a borrowed tool is damaged or never returned.

summary.text: Test a small tool-sharing library with ten households to identify which tools neighbors would share and address responsibility for damaged or unreturned items.

purpose.text: Help neighbors avoid each buying infrequently used tools such as drills or ladders.

goals.text: Run a pilot with ten households on the block.
Learn which tools people would actually share.

statement.text: Neighbors may each buy tools they use only twice a year.

blockers.text: Determine who is responsible when a borrowed tool is damaged or not returned.

questions.text: Which tools would participating households actually share?
Who should be responsible for damaged or unreturned borrowed tools?

suggestedActions.text: Invite ten households to participate in a small pilot.
Create a list of tools participants are willing to lend.
Draft a borrowing and damage-responsibility agreement for the pilot.

assessment.text: Research could help identify practical borrowing, damage, and return policies for a small neighborhood tool-sharing pilot.

suggestedQueries: neighborhood tool library borrowing agreement damaged unreturned tools
small tool lending library pilot policies

sourceSpans.quote: At work, I want to replace our scattered support handoff messages with one end-of-shift template that lists the customer, current status, owner, and next step.

ideas.coreStatement: Keep a small list of blue objects noticed on Tuesdays and see whether a pattern could become a photo series or short essay.
